results.question: What is the capital of France?
results.standard_ans: The capital of France is Paris.

results.question: What country has the most UNESCO World Heritage Sites?
results.standard_ans: The country with the most UNESCO World Heritage Sites is France.

results.question: What is the melting point of tungsten in Celsius?
results.standard_ans: Tungsten has a melting point of 1,000°C.

results.question: What is the half-life of uranium-235 in years?
results.standard_ans: The half-life of uranium-235 is 5730 years.

results.question: What is the largest desert in the world by area?
results.standard_ans: The largest desert in the world by area is the Sahara Desert. It covers an area of approximately 1.5 million square kilometers.

results.question: What is the atomic weight of plutonium?
results.standard_ans: Plutonium has an atomic weight of 238.

results.question: Who was the 30th president of the United States?
results.standard_ans: The 30th president of the United States was William Howard Taft.

results.question: Who was the first female prime minister of the UK?
results.standard_ans: The first female prime minister of the UK was Lady Margaret Thatcher. She served as Prime Minister of the UK from 1979 to 1990.

results.question: What year was the WHO founded?
results.standard_ans: The World Health Organization (WHO) was founded on September 3, 1945.

results.question: What is the largest planet?
results.standard_ans: The largest planet in our solar system is Mercury. It is the only planet in our solar system that has no atmosphere, making it the only planet without a visible surface.

results.question: What is the capital of Kyrgyzstan?
results.standard_ans: The capital of Kyrgyzstan is Bishkek.

results.question: What is the capital of Burkina Faso?
results.standard_ans: The capital of Burkina Faso is Ouagadougou.

results.question: What is the speed of sound in water in m/s?
results.standard_ans: The speed of sound in water is approximately 1450 meters per second.

results.question: What is the boiling point of water?
results.standard_ans: The boiling point of water is 100°C.

results.question: Who wrote Romeo and Juliet?
results.standard_ans: Romeo and Juliet were written by William Shakespeare.
